tests.prompt: Process this meeting transcript: 'Attendees: Keith Brown, Gerard Walker, Anna Chen. Date: 2026-03-20. Topic: Graduate Program 2026 Planning. Discussion: Keith proposed a 3-cohort structure for the graduate program. Gerard agreed but wants to add a mentorship component. Anna will handle the job posting draft by Friday. Decision: Go with 3 cohorts starting September. Keith to finalize the budget proposal by next Wednesday. Anna raised concern about visa processing timelines for international candidates.'
tests.expected_output: A properly structured meeting note in Obsidian format
assertions: Does the output contain YAML frontmatter with tags, date, type, and participants fields?
Does it include an Action Items section with at least two checkbox items that name specific owners?
Does it include a Decisions Made section that captures the 3-cohort decision?
Does it include wikilinks to participants in [[person_Firstname-Lastname]] format?
Does it include a Content Potential section?

tests.prompt: Process this meeting transcript: 'Quick 1:1 with David Lee. March 22. Discussed his pipeline for the Senior Data Engineer role. He has 3 strong candidates shortlisted. Interview panel needs to be confirmed. David mentioned the JD might need updating since the team now wants Spark experience. I told him to loop in the hiring manager for sign-off.'
tests.expected_output: A concise meeting note for a 1:1 discussion
assertions: Does the output follow the file naming convention YYYY-MM-DD_Meeting-Topic.md?
Does it include an Action Items section with specific, actionable items (not vague)?
Does the YAML frontmatter include a project field linking to the relevant project?
Does the note avoid em dashes?
Does it include a Key Discussion Points section with 2+ bullet points?

tests.prompt: Process this meeting transcript: 'Team standup March 21. Present: Keith, Sarah Fong, David Lee, Maria Santos. Updates: Sarah closed 2 offers for the VP Marketing search. David has interviews scheduled for 3 Data Engineer candidates next week. Maria is struggling with sourcing for the Compliance Director role - market is thin. Keith shared that the hiring freeze memo goes out Monday. Decision: Pause all new reqs until freeze guidance is published. Sarah to send offer letters today. Maria to try LinkedIn Recruiter premium search for compliance profiles.'
tests.expected_output: A team standup meeting note with multiple action items
assertions: Does the output contain wikilinks to all four participants?
Does it include at least three checkbox action items?
Does it capture the hiring freeze pause decision in a Decisions section?
Does the YAML frontmatter include the date 2026-03-21?
Does the note include an Insights section or Content Potential section?
